name: Northland Power Inc.
description: Since our inception in 1987, we've been committed to producing electricity from renewable resources, contributing to a greener, more sustainable future. With a diverse global portfolio including onshore renewables, natural gas energy, and regulated utilities, we're proud to own and operate clean power infrastructure assets worldwide. Currently managing approximately 3.2 GW (net 2.8 GW) of operating capacity, and with an exciting pipeline of projects totaling around 12 GW, we're dedicated to driving positive change through clean energy innovation.
